title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.1530 - Premiums, received by insurer, when — proof of purchase, insurer may require
text:
379.1530.  Premiums, received by insurer, when — proof of purchase, insurer may require. — Premiums received by a vendor or supervising business entity shall be deemed received by the insurer.  Insurers may require consumers to provide proof of purchase.
(L. 2011 S.B. 132) 
Effective 1-01-12
